visual_description: A man in a white shirt holds a mobile phone to his ear while looking downward. In the office, a woman in a light shirt sips from a cup at a desk while a man in a white shirt stands with his back turned near a glass wall. Later, another man leans over a desk writing, and a close‑up shows a man in a white shirt walking past in profile.
audio_description: The audio includes a man speaking into a phone and faint background office sounds.
